## Description

Explain what this pull request changes and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Profile or documentation update
- [ ] Automation/workflow improvement
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

Describe how you tested the change.

```bash
npm run check
git diff --check
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Internal links resolve correctly
- [ ] Generated SVG files contain valid SVG content
- [ ] Workflow changes use least-privilege permissions
- [ ] Third-party actions are pinned to a full commit SHA
- [ ] Generated outputs were updated with their source changes
- [ ] No unrelated files were changed

## Related issue

Closes #
